name: marketing_skills_for_ai_agents
description: A collection of marketing capabilities tailored for Claude Code and AI agents, covering conversion rate optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering to enhance automated marketing workflows.

inputs.name: text_content
inputs.description: Marketing-related text content such as ads, landing pages, or SEO keywords to optimize or analyze.

inputs.name: analytics_data
inputs.description: Structured data from marketing campaigns or web analytics to guide growth and CRO strategies.

inputs.name: campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Configuration parameters defining the scope and goals of marketing campaigns (e.g., target audience, budget, channels).

outputs.name: optimized_marketing_assets
outputs.description: Generated or refined marketing texts and strategies tailored for higher engagement and conversions.

outputs.name: seo_insights
outputs.description: Recommendations and keyword analyses to improve search engine rankings.

outputs.name: growth_metrics_report
outputs.description: Analytical reports evaluating campaign performance and growth engineering outcomes.

patterns: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) techniques for automated improvements
SEO keyword extraction and optimization workflows
Integrating growth engineering principles into marketing automation
steps: Collect marketing text and campaign parameters as input
Perform SEO analysis and keyword optimization on the text content
Generate or refine copywriting assets aimed at conversion improvements
Analyze campaign and web analytics data for performance insights
Produce recommendations and adjust marketing strategies based on analytics
Output optimized marketing materials and detailed growth reports
use_cases: Automated generation and optimization of marketing copy for digital campaigns
Improving conversion rates through AI-assisted CRO methodologies
Enhancing SEO strategies with machine-generated keyword and content suggestions
Monitoring and reporting marketing analytics to inform growth engineering decisions
Empowering AI agents to handle end-to-end marketing workflows

prompt_templates.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the following text for SEO opportunities and suggest improvements: {text_content}

prompt_templates.name: copywriting_improvement_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate persuasive marketing copy to increase conversion rates for this product: {campaign_parameters}

prompt_templates.name: analytics_insights_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Based on this analytics data, provide a performance report and suggest growth strategies: {analytics_data}
